items.text:
CASTING CALL – Pieces (Short Film, Cambridge)
Whilst attending university, two young men fall deeply in love, but only one of them is allowed to exist openly. Pieces is a very raw, intimate short film about a gay boy and his closeted Muslim lover. Their relationship survives only in fragments, secrecy, and silence.

Location: Cambridge

Shooting Dates: TBD

Paid/Voluntary: Voluntary, Passion Project

Role

Umar: (Playing Age 20 - 28) - Arab, North African or South Asian heritage

Character Notes: Umar is a closeted Muslim boy, struggling with religious guilt and family pressure to live a life that is not his own. MORE INFO IN PHOTOS

Things to know:

Actors should be comfortable with intense emotional and mildly intimate scenes. (Crying, Shouting, Kissing)

Able to work in a collaborative environment

How to Apply:

Please send the following to piecesshortfilm@outlook.com :

Headshot

CV / acting experience

Self Tape or Showreel (Self Tape material https://linktr.ee/piecesshortfilm)

Any additional relevant info

items.text:
Casting Call for 2nd Year Salford University Student Short Film
If interested or want more information message this account or email a.l.mccready@edu.salford.ac.uk

Filming in/around Manchester and Salford area 

These roles are unpaid however food, travel, copy and credit are provided. 

Also there is a Go Fund Me live so if you would like to donate please do. Those who donate between £5-40 will get a special thanks credit at the end of the film and those who donate £40+ will get a producer credit . All donations will go towards food for cast, travel for cast and crew and any props and locations we will be using for the short film. 

https://gofund.me/c74214529

Our Actors Gym for Lincolnshire based Professional Actors reopens on Wednesday 4th March 7pm to 9pm Grimsby Central Hall 

To qualify to be part of our Professional Group and take advantage of of the support we offer and casting opportunities that come our way you must have a current Spotlight membership. We have some very exciting announcements to be released in the coming weeks about future projects for Acting Lincs Professionals to take advantage of.

For further details on our Pro Group please email - actinglincs@gmail.com 

Come flex your Acting Muscles with us!
#actor #actorlife #lincolnshire #acting #actingclass #theatre #theatrelife

items.text:
📣🎬 CASTING CALL – SHORT MOCKUMENTARY FILM

We are casting speaking roles and male athlete extras for RAPID, a 10-minute mockumentary graduation film produced as part of the BA Filmmaking course at UWE Bristol.

The film will be shot in Bristol from 2nd–6th March 2026. This is a student project, unpaid with travel expenses and food provided, intended for university assessment, portfolio use, and festival submission.

STORY:

RAPID follows a small documentary crew as they capture former sprint star Ian Hitchworth’s attempted comeback through a chaotic charity race. 

Told in a deadpan mockumentary style, the film blends awkward comedy with moments of vulnerability. 

Humour comes through stillness, micro-expressions, and uncomfortable silences — very performance-led and character-driven.

SPEAKING ROLES:

SHOP CUSTOMER
Female, 60+
Small speaking role confronting Ian in the sports shop where he works. Dry, natural delivery.

SAM – CHANGING ROOM ATHLETE
Male, 20s
Sarcastic and cynical. Quietly undermines Ian with dry interrogation and subtle looks to camera. Comedy comes through restraint.

DUNCAN – CHANGING ROOM ATHLETE
Male, 20s
Slow-witted but fascinated by the camera. Emotionless, slightly odd presence. Competing in the trial with no real passion — just wants something to do.

EXTRAS:

MALE ATHLETE EXTRAS – CHANGING ROOM & RACE SCENES
Male, 18–35
Looking for male extras to play track athletes in changing room and race scenes.

Comfortable in sportswear and performing in a natural mockumentary-style environment. Strong reactions and subtle on-camera presence important.

Great opportunity to gain on-set experience, receive a screen credit, and obtain showreel material.

KEY INFO:
📍 Location: Bristol
📅 Shoot dates: 2nd–6th March 2026 (likely one day only for most roles)
💼 Payment: Voluntary (travel expenses & food provided)

TO APPLY:
Please send a headshot and CV (or Spotlight / Mandy link) to:
📩 rapidfilm2026@gmail.com

items.text:
Vidste du, at der findes en drik, der kan ændre dit liv? Men mange læger vil ikke have, at du skal vide det. Jeg har lidt af diabetes, kredsløbsproblemer, fedtlever og knoglesmerter i over 20 år, men en naturopatisk læge ordinerede den til mig, og det har været løsningen på alle mine lidelser.
For at fortsætte med at modtage mine recepter skal du blot sige noget... Tak!

**KORTFILM**

*VI SØGER EN KVINDE OG EN MAND I ALDEREN 19 TIL 25 ÅR TIL OPTAGELSER DEN 11. OG 12. APRIL 2026*

Vi kommer fra Den Danske Ungdomsfilmskole (Station Next Aarhus), hvor vi skal i gang med vores hovedproduktion. Det drejer sig om en komediekortfilm, som optages i foråret 2026.

Filmen handler om en mand, der forsøger at redde sit forhold, efter han har glemt at købe en årsdagsgave til sin kæreste.

Du bedes sende et selftape ud fra instruktionerne under den rolle, du søger. Manuskriptet sendes ved henvendelse.

Selftape behøver ikke være teknisk avanceret. En simpel optagelse på telefon er helt fint.

**Løn:**

Rollerne er ulønnede, men transport og forplejning dækkes.

**Optagelser:**

Optagedagene er planlagt som heldagsproduktioner begge dage.
Optagelserne finder sted i Aarhus og omegn.

**Roller:**

**Lukas:**

Alder 19 til 25 år
Lukas er en ynkelig mand, der ofte hopper over, hvor gærdet er lavest, men som vil gøre alt for at redde sit forhold.
I dit selftape skal du tage udgangspunkt i replik 35 samt replik 9 til 14.

**Sofie:**

Alder 19 til 25 år
Sofie er realistisk og tror på, at et forhold kræver tid og energi.
I dit selftape skal du tage udgangspunkt i replik 37 og ned til slutningen.

**Deadline:**

Deadline for selftape er 28. februar 2026.
Vi afholder fysisk casting den 7. marts 2026.

**Ansøgning:**

Ansøgningen sendes til Nikoline på
**nfischermikkelsen@gmail.com**

items.text:
Rytmigo går digitalt! Derfor tilbyder jeg lønnede jobs til børn der kan synge og/eller danse. Det mangler jeg:

Børn der kan synge mellem 8 - 12 år
Børn der kan danse mellem 9 - 17 år

I den forbindelse afholder jeg audition i Aalborg lørdag d. 10 Januar fra 13 - 16. Udover mig, vil der være en repræsentant fra Lille Label, som er en del af Sony. Lokationen i Aalborg sender jeg i en pm, når vi har aftalt noget endeligt. Mere info gives under audition. 

Så hvis du kender et barn der kunne tænke sig verdens fedeste fritidsjob, så send mig en mail på thomas@rytmigo.dk eller send en pb her på facebook, med lyd eller levende billeder af sang eller dans. Så aftaler vi videre derfra.  

Fremtidig indspilning af sang og video vil foregå fast i Aalborg, hovedsageligt i weekender eller ferier. Kan I ikke det, så er der ingen grund til at sende mig noget, eller melde jer til.  

Mvh
Thomas / Rytmigo

topComments.text: Mon ikke du mener en anden mdr. end Januar? 😊

items.text:
EMERGENCY CASTING CALL - ACTORS NEEDED!!! 

We're casting 2 actors and background for a 15-minute student graduation short film, titled 'March On'.

The Shooting will take place from March 16th to March 18th

Location: London, but rehearsals will be held at the University of Portsmouth. 

Pete (29-36) - Confrontational brother who lacks situational empathy

Thomas (28 - 35) - Fragile veteran bonding through shared pain

Background actors!!

**Any ***Gender*,** Any ***Race*

**Speaking Language** **-** *English*

**Playing Age -** *22+*

This is a student graduate film for the University of Portsmouth!

Transport, Accommodation, and Food will be provided.

This is a Film Festival and IMDB credit film.

***For any enquiries, contact: up2216583@myport.ac.uk***

***I've included the link to the*** ***casting call below.***

https://docs.google.com/document/d/1jYKDqlqt_QYsNSLJn6pEGRfUqRd_sdS7kHfemI-DCPs/edit?usp=drive_link

items.text:
Hi, I’m currently working on my 2nd year project for my Liverpool Institute for Performing Arts, Filmmaking and Creative Tech degree.

We need around 10-12 supporting actors for a scene in Carlisle Airport on March 1st.

Due to this being a student project, it will be unpaid. But any actors will be provided food and water. 

Thank you for any interest, and hope to hear from you soon!

items.text:
🎬 KRAKÓW | SZUKAMY ARTIOMA 🎬
CHARAKTERYSTYCZNA ROLA W KRÓTKIM METRAŻU

Do autorskiego filmu fabularnego szukamy twarzy do roli Artioma — młodego opiekuna, outsidera, postaci trochę tajemniczej i nieoczywistej. Jeśli masz w sobie spokój, surowość albo inny vibe niż wszyscy — odezwij się.

🎭 KOGO SZUKAMY:

• Mężczyzna 20–30 lat  

• Najlepiej obcokrajowiec / wschodni akcent (ale nie jest to warunek)  

• Typ skryty, naturalny, charakterystyczna prezencja  

• Doświadczenie aktorskie mile widziane, ale niekonieczne

📅 Zdjęcia: 1.03  

📍 Kraków  

⏰ Dyspozycyjność całodniowa  

🎥 PROJEKT NON-PROFIT — robimy to z zajawki, w dobrej ekipie i z naciskiem na mocny materiał do portfolio

Szukamy autentyczności, nie perfekcji.

📩 ZGŁOSZENIA: film24m24@gmail.com lub priv

Imię + wiek + miasto  

zdjęcia (twarz + sylwetka)  

video

🎬 Missed Our Last Webinar? Join This Week’s Free Virtual Production, VFX & AI Session

If you didn’t get a chance to attend our previous webinar, this is your opportunity to jump in.

You’re invited to a free live webinar on February 12, hosted by IDigital Creative Studio and the Academy of Volumetric Production.

Sign up Now! https://forms.gle/9CGiZbwWRgcoQKGG8  

We’ll dive into how Virtual Production, VFX, AI, and real-time workflows are reshaping the way films are conceived, produced, and delivered today, across both independent and studio productions.

✨ We’ll also share an exclusive case study from Train Dreams, a feature film with 4 Academy Award® nominations, including Best Picture, offering a behind-the-scenes look at its Virtual Production workflow.

Free Webinar | Virtual Production, VFX & AI for Everyone

📅 February 12

⏰ Two sessions: 9:00 AM PT | 4:00 PM PT

🎥 Live · Free · Online

Save your spot! https://forms.gle/9CGiZbwWRgcoQKGG8  

We’d love to see you there and connect live.

The Academy of Volumetric Production Team

Where Innovation Meets Entertainment

items.text:
The Vertical Revolution: How a $30 Billion Format is Reshaping Hollywood's Future

I have witnessed the tectonic shifts of this industry for over four decades. As a working SAG-AFTRA actor for 40 years and a branding and audition specialist coaching talent in Hollywood for the last 18, I’ve had a front-row seat to history. I’ve navigated the rise of cable television, which redefined premium content. I’ve lived through the streaming revolution, which shattered distribution models and turned the industry inside out.

But what I am witnessing right now—this explosion of vertical content—eclipses them both.

This isn’t just a trend. It is a seismic, ground-up restructuring of how audiences consume stories and how careers are built. We are witnessing the birth of a new medium, and I have never—in 40 years—seen an opportunity this vast, this immediate, or this revolutionary. The game has changed again, but this time, the rules haven't just been rewritten; they've been demolished.

Welcome to The Vertical Revolution. We are standing at the precipice of a $30 Billion format that is reshaping Hollywood's future.

Vertical films—once dismissed as a social media novelty—have exploded into a dominant economic force, fundamentally altering how Hollywood creates and distributes content. Netflix is launching a dedicated vertical division. Multiple streaming platforms now exist solely for 9:16 content. The reach of these projects is staggering. When you book a vertical, your face isn't just seen across the United States and its 350 million viewers—these productions are engineered for global domination, specifically targeting China and India, whose combined populations approach 3 billion people.

That means your work can literally reach billions of screens across the planet overnight.

Make no mistake: The major studios are all-in. They are enlisting A-list producers, writers, and talent to develop premium vertical content for this worldwide audience. The question is no longer if this format will take over, but who will be working in it.

I haven't been watching this trend from the sidelines—I’ve been living it. I have personally booked five verticals, and select students of mine have booked upwards of 30 projects combined. We are proof that the opportunities are not just real—they are accessible, and they are happening right now.

If you are not jumping on this bandwagon, you are not just missing a trend—you are missing the single biggest expansion of working opportunities for actors in a generation.

As your branding and marketing coach, I don’t just report on the news—I provide the roadmap to navigate this new landscape and claim your place in it. I will teach you exactly where to find these auditions. I will show you how to directly connect with the producers and casting directors who are greenlighting these projects right now. I will coach you on the nuanced techniques required to audition for verticals—skills that differ radically from traditional TV and film.

And it doesn’t stop at booking the job. I will show you how to leverage your vertical credits on social media for maximum exposure, and how to strategically negotiate your pay, your transportation, and your billing status.

The industry is pivoting to the vertical format. The train is leaving the station.

I am here to ensure you are on it—and that you profit from it.

Let's build your brand for the future of film.

Visit KentKasper.net to get started. The revolution is here. Don't watch it from the outside.

sharedPost.text:
CASTING DO NOWEGO PROJEKTU AKTORSKIEGO!

Marzysz o wystąpieniu na scenie, ale do tej pory nie miałxś okazji?
To idealny moment, aby spróbować swoich sił! 
Szukamy osób pełnych zaangażowania, otwartych i chętnych do rozwoju, mieszkających w okolicach Trójmiasta. 
Z nami zdobędziesz nowe doświadczenia, poznasz świetnych ludzi i weźmiesz udział w wyjątkowym projekcie artystycznym, którego efektem będzie spektakl muzyczny. 

Kogo szukamy?
Osób, w wieku 16-25 lat, które mają doświadczenie aktorskie, wokalne lub taneczne. (Będzie to duży atut.)
Jeśli nie masz takiego doświadczenia, a czujesz pasję i chęć rozwoju, lub jesteś w innym wieku – również rozważymy Twoje zgłoszenie! 
Warto próbować ;))

Jak aplikować?
Zgłoszenie wyślij na adres przedostatniprzystanek@gmail.com do 1 stycznia włącznie. 
Mail powinien zawierać:
*  krótki opis Twojej osoby, 
* informację dlaczego chcesz dołączyć,
*  opis twoich dotychczasowych doświadczeń artystycznych (CV, możesz wysłać też selftape),
* aktualne zdjęcie sylwetki oraz portretowe,
* link do twojego facebooka/ messengera;))

Etapy castingu:
Wybrane osoby zaprosimy do drugiego etapu, który odbędzie się 11.01 w Gdańsku. Więcej informacji przyślemy w odpowiedzi na maila zgłoszeniowego (do 4 stycznia włącznie). 

Organizacja prób:
Spotkania projektowe będą odbywać się w czwartki, w godzinach 16-20, w Gdańsku.

Jeśli czujesz, że to może być coś dla Ciebie, nie czekaj! Daj nam znać i dołącz do wyjątkowego projektu, który może stać się początkiem Twojej scenicznej drogi. 

W razie jakichkolwiek pytań zapraszamy do kontaktu na naszych social mediach @przedostatniprzystanek lub na maila przedostatniprzystanek@gmail.com. 

Czekamy właśnie na ciebie!
Zespół Przedostatniego Przystanku.  

* projekt NON PROFIT
•
•
•
#przedostatniprzystanek #sztuka #teatr #castingcall #casting

items.title: 🎬 Zapraszam do współpracy! 🎬

items.text:
**🎬 CREW & SCHAUSPIELER GESUCHT — Psychological Horror Kurzfilm (Festivalprojekt)  **

Hallo zusammen,  

für meinen ersten eigenen Kurzfilm (ca. 15 Min.) suche ich eine kleine, engagierte Crew sowie Darsteller:innen im Raum Bayern.

Ziel ist ein atmosphärischer Festivalfilm, der mit begrenzten Mitteln hochwertig umgesetzt wird.  

📍 Drehort: Roßlach (Franken, Bayern) — außergewöhnliche Innenlocation  

📅 2–3 kompakte Drehtage (Termin flexibel)  

💰 No/Low Budget (Verpflegung + Fahrtkosten nach Absprache)  

🏆 Festival-Einreichungen 

🎬 Starkes Showreel-Material  

---

🩸 **STORY (kurz)  **

Eine Jugendliche nimmt nachts eine streunende Katze mit nach Hause.  

Am nächsten Morgen ist sie verschwunden — stattdessen befindet sich mitten im Wohnzimmer ein...  

Während Familie und Geistliche versuchen zu begreifen, was geschehen ist, wird klar:  

Etwas wurde nicht begraben — sondern festgehalten.  

Atmosphärischer Horror, stark schauspielgetrieben, Fokus auf Spannung und Bildsprache statt Effekte.

---

**🎥 BESONDERS GESUCHT: KAMERA / DoP ** 

Der Film lebt von Licht, Bewegung und Atmosphäre — keine Effekt-Show.  

• Erfahrung mit Innenraum-Lichtsetzung  

• Gefühl für Spannung statt Jumpscares  

• Eigenes Equipment von Vorteil  

• Interesse an visuell starkem Erzählen  

---

**🎬 WEITERE CREW  **

• Set-Ton  

• Licht / Gaffer  

• Produktionsassistenz  

• Maske (auch Einsteiger willkommen)  

• Motivierte Allrounder  

• Unterstützung in Postproduktion / Organisation willkommen  

---

🎭 SCHAUSPIELER:INNEN  

• Jugendliche Rolle (w / ca. 15–18)  

• Erwachsene Rollen (Mutter 50-55, Pfarrer 30-35, Imam 55-65)  

Intensive, emotional starke Szenen.

---

🧠 **WAS MIR WICHTIG IST  **

✔️ Zuverlässigkeit und Teamgeist  

✔️ Interesse an einem ernsthaft umgesetzten Indie-Projekt  

✔️ Kreativer Input ausdrücklich erwünscht  

✔️ Gerne auch Menschen, die das Projekt bis zur Festivalphase begleiten möchten  

---

Wenn du Interesse hast, schreib mir gern eine PN mit kurzer Vorstellung

Empfehlungen oder Weiterleitungen sind ebenfalls willkommen 🙏  

#CrewCall #FilmcrewGesucht #Kurzfilm #Horrorfilm  

#DoP #KameraGesucht #SchauspielerGesucht  

#IndieFilm #Festivalfilm #Filmstudenten  

#Bamberg #oberfranken
items.summary:
**🎬 CREW & SCHAUSPIELER GESUCHT — Psychological Horror Kurzfilm (Festivalprojekt)  **

Hallo zusammen,  

für meinen ersten eigenen Kurzfilm (ca. 15 Min.) suche ich eine kleine, engagierte Crew sowie Darsteller:innen im Raum Bayern.

Ziel ist ein atmosphärischer Festivalfilm, der mit begrenzten Mitteln hochwertig umgesetzt wird.  

📍 Drehort: Roßlach (Franken, Bayern) — außergewöhnliche Innenlocation  

📅 2–3 kompakte Drehtage (Termin flexibel)  

💰 No/Low Budget (Verpflegung + Fahrtkosten nach Absprache)  

🏆 Festival-Einreichungen 

🎬 Starkes Showreel-Material  

---

🩸 **STORY (kurz)  **

Eine Jugendliche nimmt nachts eine streunende Katze mit nach Hause.  

Am nächsten Morgen ist sie verschwunden — stattdessen befindet sich mitten im Wohnzimmer ein...  

Während Familie und Geistliche versuchen zu begreifen, was geschehen ist, wird klar:  

Etwas wurde nicht begraben — sondern festgehalten.  

Atmosphärischer Horror, stark schauspielgetrieben, Fokus auf Spannung und Bildsprache statt Effekte.

---

**🎥 BESONDERS GESUCHT: KAMERA / DoP ** 

Der Film lebt von Licht, Bewegung und Atmosphäre — keine Effekt-Show.  

• Erfahrung mit Innenraum-Lichtsetzung  

• Gefühl für Spannung statt Jumpscares  

• Eigenes Equipment von Vorteil  

• Interesse an visuell starkem Erzählen  

---

**🎬 WEITERE CREW  **

• Set-Ton  

• Licht / Gaffer  

• Produktionsassistenz  

• Maske (auch Einsteiger willkommen)  

• Motivierte Allrounder  

• Unterstützung in Postproduktion / Organisation willkommen  

---

🎭 SCHAUSPIELER:INNEN  

• Jugendliche Rolle (w / ca. 15–18)  

• Erwachsene Rollen (Mutter 50-55, Pfarrer 30-35, Imam 55-65)  

Intensive, emotional starke Szenen.

---

🧠 **WAS MIR WICHTIG IST  **

✔️ Zuverlässigkeit und Teamgeist  

✔️ Interesse an einem ernsthaft umgesetzten Indie-Projekt  

✔️ Kreativer Input ausdrücklich erwünscht  

✔️ Gerne auch Menschen, die das Projekt bis zur Festivalphase begleiten möchten  

---

Wenn du Interesse hast, schreib mir gern eine PN mit kurzer Vorstellung

Empfehlungen oder Weiterleitungen sind ebenfalls willkommen 🙏  

#CrewCall #FilmcrewGesucht #Kurzfilm #Horrorfilm  

#DoP #KameraGesucht #SchauspielerGesucht  

#IndieFilm #Festivalfilm #Filmstudenten  

#Bamberg #oberfranken

items.title: KOMPARSE.DE

topComments.text:
Falls , nicht schon geschehen,  solltest du vernünftige Fotos haben mit denen du dich bei Komparse.de  oder Agenturen bewerben kannst. Diese wollen mindestens 4 Fotos, davon ein Profilfoto, ein Ganzkörperfoto, vor neutralem hellen Hintergrund. Jeweils einmal lächelnd und einmal neutraler Gesichtsausdruck. Mit deinem Facebook Profil  wirst du da kaum, eher null Chancen haben irgendwo gebucht zu werden. 
Man muss schon Aktiv werden, nicht jedem fallen die Komparsen Jobs in den Schoß! 
Auch würde ich bei Gesuchen etwas mehr schreiben,  wie nur, "Hallo ich suche Job" überspitzt ausgedrückt! 
Viel Erfolg bei der Suche! 
Gruß

items.text:
# **Nowe możliwości na planie – sprawdź najświeższe projekty! 🎬**

*Baza ogłoszeń została właśnie uzupełniona o kolejne, pilne nabory. To świetna okazja, aby dołączyć do obsady znanych seriali, wystąpić w reklamach lub wziąć udział w nagraniach telewizyjnych jako publiczność. Wszystkie zlecenia są płatne, a produkcje szukają osób w różnym wieku i o różnorodnej urodzie.*
## **Seriale i produkcje telewizyjne**
* **Serial „Lombard. Życie pod zastaw” (Wrocław / Cała Polska):** Poszukiwani są aktorzy w wieku 17–20 lat. Projekt z możliwością dojazdu.
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=112084
* **Serial „Zaraz Wracam” (Warszawa):** Produkcja szuka statystów (kobiety i mężczyźni) w wieku 25–40 lat.
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=112083
* **Serial „Ukryta Prawda” (Warszawa):** Do obsady poszukiwana jest aktorka w wieku 30–35 lat.
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=112082
* **Serial True Crime (Warszawa):** Poszukiwani są statyści do mrocznych i realistycznych scen. Projekt pilny!
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=112080 
## **Reklamy, spoty i nagrania studyjne**
* **Publiczność do programu publicystycznego (Warszawa):** Poszukiwane są osoby w wieku 18–50 lat, które chcą zasiąść na widowni.
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=112090
* **Reklama – statyści o różnym pochodzeniu (Warszawa):** Produkcja szuka osób o pochodzeniu azjatyckim, afrykańskim i innym (wiek 18–80 lat).
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=112089
* **Spot reklamowy (Warszawa):** Pilnie poszukiwany jest noworodek do udziału w nagraniach.
https://www.easycasting.pl/audition.asp?id=112081

👉 **Załóż darmowy profil i wyślij zgłoszenie jednym kliknięciem:** www.easycasting.pl

items.text:
CASTING CALL - NOTTINGHAMSHIRE/DERBYSHIRE - SHORT FILM ‘Before You Go’
Coming-of-age short film following a group of teenagers

LUCY (18) - DUAL PROTAGONIST: 

Need a 17-19 year old girl, preferably over 5’2. Plays older sister of DANIEL.

DANIEL (12) - DUAL PROTAGONIST: Need a 13-16 year old boy, preferably below 5’7. Plays younger brother of LUCY.

BECKY (18) - SUPPORTING: Need a 17-19 year old girl. Plays best friend of LUCY and girlfriend of LUKE.

LUKE (18) - SUPPORTING: Need a 17-19 year old boy. Plays boyfriend of BECKY.

If possible, a man and woman 30-50 for supporting role of parents, needed for 1 shooting day.

Dates: April/May TBC, need 4-6 shooting days. Can discuss sorting travel.

Location: NOTTINGHAMSHIRE/DERBYSHIRE 

UNPAID, good for experience, will be sent to film festivals.

PLEASE EMAIL sunflowerfilmstudios@gmail.com , message here on facebook or @sunflowerfilmstudios on Instagram (preferably) with a headshot and requested role. More information will be sent when contacted.

items.text:
The Good Old Days
https://calendly.com/jayhubert/2026-uccs-capstone-auditions-march-1

Genre: Comedy/Drama 

Logline: Zack has an interaction with a stranger after months stuck at home with his friend Daniel. Throughout the story, we learn how strong the fear of the outside world can be, causing Zack to fight through challenges to achieve his goal of going out to a party. While Daniel goes through multiple lengths, even illegal, to make sure Zack does not achive his goals.

Roles: Zack (21-28 years old) - Male, any ethnicity.

Zack is an introvert who has been afraid of the outside world. He knows how converse and interact with humans and craves connection to the world outside, but due to Daniels bad influence on him he needs to fight for it.

Daniel (21-28 years old) - Male, any ethnicity

Daniel is a force of fear. He is over the top afraid anathing that may happen outside the house. Even going through huge lengths, sometimes even illegal acts, to make sure Zack will not achieve his goals.

Ed (21-30 years old) - Male, any ethnicity 

Ed is a laid back, delivery driver. He is put into Zack's life to challenge him to go outside and attend the party he invites him to. Zack is a people person who likes talking to others.

Directed & Written: Luca Mendes

Producer: Journey Forrest

Production Type: Student Capstone Short Film.

Contact Information: thegoodolddaysfilm@gmail.com

Run time: Short film (7-8 min)

Compensation: Non-Paid, Non-Union

Audition Information: March 1st, 2026, 11am to 7pm.

Shooting Date: March 28th, 2026. (Must be available all day)

https://calendly.com/jayhubert/2026-uccs-capstone-auditions-march-1

topComments.text: Luca has a great script for this film, and all three roles have a lot for actors to chew on. Daniel is an especially fun role, as he gets progressively more hysterical and over the top in his actions and reactions throughout the film!

items.summary:
The Good Old Days
https://calendly.com/jayhubert/2026-uccs-capstone-auditions-march-1

Genre: Comedy/Drama 

Logline: Zack has an interaction with a stranger after months stuck at home with his friend Daniel. Throughout the story, we learn how strong the fear of the outside world can be, causing Zack to fight through challenges to achieve his goal of going out to a party. While Daniel goes through multiple lengths, even illegal, to make sure Zack does not achive his goals.

Roles: Zack (21-28 years old) - Male, any ethnicity.

Zack is an introvert who has been afraid of the outside world. He knows how converse and interact with humans and craves connection to the world outside, but due to Daniels bad influence on him he needs to fight for it.

Daniel (21-28 years old) - Male, any ethnicity

Daniel is a force of fear. He is over the top afraid anathing that may happen outside the house. Even going through huge lengths, sometimes even illegal acts, to make sure Zack will not achieve his goals.

Ed (21-30 years old) - Male, any ethnicity 

Ed is a laid back, delivery driver. He is put into Zack's life to challenge him to go outside and attend the party he invites him to. Zack is a people person who likes talking to others.

Directed & Written: Luca Mendes

Producer: Journey Forrest

Production Type: Student Capstone Short Film.

Contact Information: thegoodolddaysfilm@gmail.com

Run time: Short film (7-8 min)

Compensation: Non-Paid, Non-Union

Audition Information: March 1st, 2026, 11am to 7pm.

Shooting Date: March 28th, 2026. (Must be available all day)

https://calendly.com/jayhubert/2026-uccs-capstone-auditions-march-1

Be on the lookout for upcoming casting notices as well as future different meetings.  Improv meeting film group.  Also will have some action scenes thrown in at the next group meeting.  Let me know if you’re interested to join! 

👌🍀🎬🤑

sharedPost.text:
I wanted to thank everyone-for coming to our pre production mixer last week.  It ended up being a really good tune out!  We had over 55 people show up!  Check out the photo, look at my eyes.  Goodness.  

Be in the look out for upcoming announcements for upcoming castings and group meetings!  We have more coming in the beginning of march.  

ALSo, check out this video.  The camera on my new Razr Flip phone is really nice.  
This is our improv scene we shot.  It was super fun!

https://youtu.be/PgPO1E0cUWo?si=ymv2kiqbyBQfy2Hs

message.text:
THE ALMOST FERAL INTELLIGENCE OF A GOOD ACTOR 

“A good actor is intelligent in a rustic, basic, almost feral way: He or she has been observing people in various behaviors for a lifetime, noticing how they operate, how they think, how they take in information. Almost all good actors are recessive, shy. In an audition or a meeting, you can see the way their eyes move and their hands work, and you instantly recognize the child they were and the artist they’re becoming. They are always studying, taking things in.”

~~ director ELIA KAZAN on acting and directing (1993).

PETER GARAS, Toronto Actor says:
“By January 2023, I had spent the last year+ pursuing what I love – being an actor. I had done a lot of projects & training & was starting to feel confident that I could get an agent & take the next step. That’s when a friend of mine suggested I get in contact with Michael Caruana.
Thus, I began the Certificate Program at bongo productions. We launched into what would be some of the most productive months of my career. It was evident from the start that Michael was an expert & knew how to develop & explore the limits of acting.
I gained more than just a coach with Michael; I gained a friend. 
Thank you,

Ok, we’re SPRINGing forward! ☀️🙂

NEW DATES FOR MARCH  SCENE-STUDY CLASS - THURSDAYS, MARCH 5, 12, 19, 26 - 6-9 pm. 🎬🎥🎭

In this Scene-study class, we’re preparing and taping scenes, telling compelling stories, reviewing foundational process preparation techniques.

I offer an inspirational class, exploring the range and development of your talent.

Sign up now to revitalize your screen acting experience. The cost for this series of 4, 3 hr classes is $299 +tx.

For more information or to sign up, call or text: 416 294-3754 or email: bongoproductions@rogers.com

Come train with actor and coach, Michael Caruana. Expert guidance and coaching, trusted, since 1996, at bongo productions. 

Private Coaching.
Scene-study.
Audition Technique. 

Comprehensive training with our Certificate Program.

bongo productions is a proud member of AACE! (Association of Acting Coaches and Educators)

items.text:
Hi everyone!

I’m an actress based in the Netherlands, with a playing age of 15–30.

EMERGENCY CASTING CALL - ACTORS NEEDED!!! 

We're casting 2 actors and background for a 15-minute student graduation short film, titled 'March On'.

The Shooting will take place from March 16th to March 18th

Location: London, but rehearsals will be held at the University of Portsmouth. 

Pete (29-36) - Confrontational brother who lacks situational empathy

Thomas (28 - 35) - Fragile veteran bonding through shared pain

Background actors!!

**Any ***Gender*,** Any ***Race*

**Speaking Language** **-** *English*

**Playing Age -** *22+*

This is a student graduate film for the University of Portsmouth!

Transport, Accommodation, and Food will be provided.

This is a Film Festival and IMDB credit film.

***For any enquiries, contact: up2216583@myport.ac.uk***

items.text:
CASTING CALL FOR VIRTUAL REALITY SHORT FILM!
THE SOUND OF ONE EYE CLOSING

PAID OPPORTUNITY - OPEN TO NON-UNION AND UNION ACTORS

SHOOT DATES: Late April 2026. 

Cory: Lead. Mid to late twenties, white, lesbian, she/her. Forced to deal with her strong need for internal control following a heartbreak. Emotionally intense and depressive. 3 days of shooting.

Indigo: Supporting. Mid to late twenties, white or racially ambiguous, lesbian, she/her. Whimsical in a Pacific Northwest, vibram-toe-shoe and herbal tea style. Charismatic leader with strong boundaries and a hint of a need for approval from others. 3 days of shooting. 

To apply, please send your Headshot, Resume and Demo Reel to: thesoundofoneeyeclosing@gmail.com

Thank you!

We’re looking for people of all backgrounds and ages to help bring this project to life! Whether you have on-set experience or are brand new and curious, we’d love to hear from you.

items.text:
Hello all, I’m in need of some voice over artists for a large project happing in March/April.  

Must be from Wales as I need Welsh accents.  Half the project is in Welsh and half in English (Welsh accent).  

Recording will be taking place at my studio in central Liverpool.  If you’re local and free for the above shoot me a message.  The project will take place over multiple sessions so quite a bit of work going if you’re interested!

EDIT:  Welsh natives only, can’t just be doing a Welsh accent im afraid.  The recording will be taking place in Liverpool April time ish over 5 days or so.  Please only get in touch if the above works for you.  Thanks!

topComments.text: Hi James, I’m an Actress from North West Wales who is fluent in the Welsh language. I have a degree in acting and have lived in Liverpool for over 6 years now, I’m highly interested in this opportunity and would love to speak more about it, thank you :)

I'm not Welsh but I played a Welsh  character in the Ragged Trousered Philanthropists. I'm not Irish either but I played an Irish farmer in a trip to the cottage.  You don't have to be from the place that your character is from. I've yet to see a Danish sounding  Hamlet .

Recording will be taking place at my studio in central Liverpool.  If you’re local and free for the above shoot me a message.  The project will take place over multiple sessions so quite a bit of work going if you’re interested!

EDIT:  Welsh natives only, can’t just be doing a Welsh accent im afraid.  The recording will be taking place in Liverpool April time ish over 5 days or so.  Please only get in touch if the above works for you.  Thanks!
items.title: Hello all, I’m in need of some voice over artists for a large project happing in March/April.

sharedPost.text:
Do Teatru Telewizji, poszukujemy:
🔹 Lokaj - statysta

• mężczyzna 18-30 lat

🔹 Przymiarki + próba - 7.03 (od 15:00 do 18:30) - płatne 70 zł

📍 Termin zdjęć: 31.03

📍 Miejsce: Warszawa

📍 Charakter zdjęć: dzienne, wnętrze.

💰 Stawka: 150 zł za dzień zdjęciowy + przymiarki z próbą 70 zł

(płatne gotówką po planie) 

📸 Wymagania:

• brak widocznych tatuaży

• schludni, eleganccy, estetyczni; „dworska” aparycja, wymagania: ogoleni, klasyczna fryzura, zadbany wygląd (praca w pałacowych scenach) 

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na:

sky.zgloszenia@gmail.com

W tytule maila: „Lokaj 31.03”

📌 W treści maila (OBOWIĄZKOWO):

• aktualne zdjęcia (w tym selfie wykonane w dniu zgłoszenia)

• numer telefonu

• wymiary

• wiek

❗ Zgłoszenia bez kompletu wymaganych informacji nie będą rozpatrywane.

Hola gente, les comparto nuestro nuevo proyecto y video promocional de nuestro trabajo actualizado 2026 que tenemos para ti, estuvimos bajo el gran lente de la gran producción fotográfica CC7 Estudio, Photo & Film. A cargo del máster Carlos Arturo Catalan Guzman espero y se deleiten con esta joyita !! Buenas tardes, estamos para serviles, somos Circompañia- Elemento fuego 
A sus órdenes. 
.
.
.
.
.
.
.

items.text:
**SPOTY SOCIAL MEDIA 4-5.03 lub  24.03 [Warszawa]**

Do krótkich spotów do social media poszukuję  epizodystów do poniższych krótkich scenek (plan 2-4h max.):
1. Kobieta z akwarium (wiek 20-25 lat), 4.03, stawka 500 zł 
2. Przyjaciółka w kawiarni (wiek 25-30 lat), 5.03, stawka 500 zł 
3. Kobieta na ściance wspinaczkowej (wiek 25-35), trzeba będzie wejść na 1.5-2m max., 4.03, stawka 700 zł 
4. Mężczyzna na ściance wspinaczkowej (wiek 25-35 lat), trzeba będzie wejść na 1.5-2m max., 4.03, stawka 700 zł 
5. Kobieta w kawiarni (wiek 25-35 lat)- zamawia kawę po francusku, włosku lub hiszpańsku. Wymagana znajomość któregoś z języków, 5.03, stawka 700 zł
6. Mężczyźni podróżnicy (25-40 lat) - w formie, wysportowani, 24.03, stawka 600 zł (dwie sceny) 

**Zgłoszenia proszę kierować na priv. Podsyłając aktualne zdjęcia, wideo wizytówkę oraz informację o ewentualnych umiejętnościach. **

topComments.text: wysłana wiadomość priv 🙂 pewnie wpadła do sekcji inne.

sharedPost.text:
Casting do Pitbulla.
Emilia Nowak to kolejna wersja człowieka dość cynicznego.

Jest samotny nawet z kimś będąc, ale to jego wybór. Gdy mu to mimo wszystko jednak przeszkadza, to posiłkuje się zmyślonymi castingami, aby chociaż przez chwilę coś znaczyć.

items.text:
**TITLE**: The Jackal’s Office

**GENRE**: Drama

**LOGLINE**: Set in a bureaucratic afterlife, The Jackal’s Office is a take on the weighing of the heart ceremony with the Egyptian god, Anubis.

**ROLES**:

**JACK**- M, 20s-40s. Tailored, forthright, weigher of hearts.

**MILO**- M, 20s. Gruff, self-regarding, recently deceased.

**Production Company**: Poison Ink Productions, Dir. Aiden Villarreal

**Production Type**: Short Film

**Contact Information**: poisoninkproductions@gmail.com

**Run Time**: Short

**Compensation**: Unpaid. Reel footage, meals, and snacks provided.

**Union Status**: Non-Union

**Audition Information**: Please submit through QR code, or through this link: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdF5cfG3jvJ2byKe6belFQlGRx1zm2Qa88__m9tFAB8DVT4RQ/viewform

Self tape auditions due by the evening of Sunday, March 1st.

Sides are attached to link above.

**Shooting Schedule**: March 14th &15th

**Filming Location**: Denver

items.text:
**TITLE:** A Thirst That Kills 

**GENRE: **Dark Drama / Tragedy 

**LOGLINE:** Desperate to reclaim the woman he loves, a drowning alcoholic reaches for anything to stay afloat, only to discover some lifelines pull you under faster.  

**ROLES: **

**Keith - **18-38 / Male / Any Ethnicity - Keith is a charming, intelligent, emotionally articulate man who drinks because sobriety would force him to sit alone with himself. He’s not a stereotype drunk. He’s functional, witty, and painfully self-aware. That’s what makes him dangerous to himself. Keith doesn’t believe he’s worthless. That’s the tragedy. He believes he’s almost worth saving. If he could just get Cassie back, just get through tonight, just take the edge off, then maybe tomorrow he’ll fix everything. Tomorrow never comes.

**Cassie - **18-38 / Female / Any Ethnicity - Cassie is strong, compassionate, and exhausted. She is not cold, she’s done bleeding. Loving Keith cost her too much of herself, and she finally chose survival over hope. She still loves him. That’s what makes her boundary so painful. Cassie isn’t rejecting Keith out of cruelty or anger; she’s rejecting the cycle. Every word she speaks to him is careful, restrained, and heavy with history.

**Robert** - 18-38 / Male / Any Ethnicity - Robert is Keith’s mirror, what Keith could look like if he cleaned up just enough to function. He’s not malicious, not reckless, not stupid. He’s human. Robert wants to help Keith, but he wants to help without sacrifice. He doesn’t want confrontation, ultimatums, or responsibility. Giving Keith Percocet feels like kindness, like pragmatism. It’s easier than saying, “You need real help,” because that would force Robert to examine his own habits.

**PRODUCTION COMPANY: **A UCCS student film, directed by **Brett Nagy, **written** **by** Brett Nagy** and produced by **Tyla Stogsdill.**

**PRODUCTION TYPE: **Indie / short film.

**CONTACT INFORMATION:** athirstthatkillsfilm@gmail.com

**RUN TIME:** 10 min short.

**COMPENSATION: **Non-Paid.

**UNION STATUS:** Non-Union.

**AUDITION INFORMATION: **Saturday -** **February 28, 2026. Location: UCCS Campus - El Pomar Center 103 (directions will be sent by email)

**SHOOTING SCHEDULE:** one 12 hour shoot day held on Wednesday - March 25, 2026.

**Cassie - **18-38 / Female / Any Ethnicity - Cassie is strong, compassionate, and exhausted. She is not cold, she’s done bleeding. Loving Keith cost her too much of herself, and she finally chose survival over hope. She still loves him. That’s what makes her boundary so painful. Cassie isn’t rejecting Keith out of cruelty or anger; she’s rejecting the cycle. Every word she speaks to him is careful, restrained, and heavy with history.

**Robert** - 18-38 / Male / Any Ethnicity - Robert is Keith’s mirror, what Keith could look like if he cleaned up just enough to function. He’s not malicious, not reckless, not stupid. He’s human. Robert wants to help Keith, but he wants to help without sacrifice. He doesn’t want confrontation, ultimatums, or responsibility. Giving Keith Percocet feels like kindness, like pragmatism. It’s easier than saying, “You need real help,” because that would force Robert to examine his own habits.

**PRODUCTION COMPANY: **A UCCS student film, directed by **Brett Nagy, **written** **by** Brett Nagy** and produced by **Tyla Stogsdill.**

**PRODUCTION TYPE: **Indie / short film.

**CONTACT INFORMATION:** athirstthatkillsfilm@gmail.com

**RUN TIME:** 10 min short.

**COMPENSATION: **Non-Paid.

**UNION STATUS:** Non-Union.

**AUDITION INFORMATION: **Saturday -** **February 28, 2026. Location: UCCS Campus - El Pomar Center 103 (directions will be sent by email)

**SHOOTING SCHEDULE:** one 12 hour shoot day held on Wednesday - March 25, 2026.

sharedPost.text:
Der Kino Mittwoch auf radioYpsilon 

MOVIETIME KW 9/2026

DER FINALE FIGHT IN WOODSBORO UND OSCARANWÄRTER TIMOTHY CHALAMET 

Entschlossen ihre Familie zu beschützen, ist Sidney gezwungen, sich dem Schrecken aus ihrer Vergangenheit zu stellen, um das Blutbad ein für alle Mal zu beenden in SCREAM 7. 

Schuhverkäufer Marty hat nur ein Ziel im Leben: Weltmeister im Tischtennis zu werden und somit in den Olymp der gefeierten Athleten aufzusteigen. Die Rolle des MARTY SUPREME könnte für den Hauptdarsteller zum Gewinn des Oscars reichen.

Natürlich gibt es auch in dieser Sendung Interviews unter anderem mit Isabella Willinger, Elly Senger-Weiss oder Ganaël Dumreicher aus der Kooperation mit Cinema Next.

Abgerundet wird die Sendung wie immer mit Musik aus den Soundtracks der letzten 85 Jahre.

Mittwoch 25.2.2026 von 18 bis 19h auf radioYpsilon 94.5 oder via Stream (http://mp3.radioypsilon.at:8000/)

items.text:
Stell dir vor, du wirst endlich als Schauspieler ernst genommen.

Genau das ist der Punkt, an dem viele Quereinsteiger stehen, die eigentlich für die Bühne oder die Kamera bestimmt sind – aber nie die richtige Möglichkeit bekommen haben.

Dieses Jahr öffnen wir wieder Plätze in unserer berufsbegleitenden Schauspielausbildung. Und ehrlich gesagt suchen wir keine „perfekten Lebensläufe“.

Wir suchen echte Persönlichkeiten.

Menschen mit Ecken, Kanten, Geschichten.

Menschen, die schon lange spüren, dass mehr in ihnen steckt.

Vielleicht bist genau du jemand, der bisher übersehen wurde.

Vielleicht hat dir nur der richtige Rahmen gefehlt, um dein Talent ernsthaft zu entwickeln.

Wenn dich das anspricht, schreib mir einfach „**Schauspiel**“ in die Kommentare oder schick mir eine Nachricht und erzähl mir kurz von dir.

items.text:
New dates added - Dec 8-19 in Las Vegas. To book go to https://rebrand.ly/freehdsht

FREE HEADSHOT and 1-HOUR SESSION – East Summerlin, Las Vegas

Address sent automatically after booking

Hi! I’m Steve Fogarty, a Las Vegas headshot specialist and owner of EXPO TRAFFIC, where we run large-scale headshot activations for major trade shows (600-700 people over 2.5 days).

I’m currently testing new lighting setups and posing flows for upcoming conventions, and I’m looking for real people to sit for practice sessions in a more relaxed environment. In return for your time, you get a full headshot session and one professional, retouched headshot for free.

**What You Get**
* A 60–75 minute headshot session
* Multiple looks + lighting setups
* A private online gallery
* One edited, retouched image included
* Additional images optional (zero pressure)

**Examples of my retouching**

[https://rebrand.ly/retouching](https://rebrand.ly/retouching)

Why There’s a $20 Fee

It’s not a sales charge. It’s a **non-refundable security deposit and show-up guarantee** that ensures the schedule stays reliable for both of us. The $20 simply confirms your commitment to attend — and your favorite image is still included for free.

How You Get Your Image

After the session:
* We will review your images, and you'll tell me which ones are your favorites that you do not want deleted.
* I will edit and retouch your favorites, then upload them to your private gallery.
* You can download your favorite image using a coupon code (provided).
* You’re welcome to purchase extras, but it’s totally optional.

What to Expect / How to Prepare
* Arrive camera-ready (mirror + restroom available)
* Plan for 3–4 different looks
* Avoid pure white tops if possible
* Relax — I’ll guide you through every pose and expression

Safety + Professionalism
* All public areas are video security-monitored for your comfort and safety
* Private areas (bathrooms, changing areas) are never recorded
* References available by request

You can preview my work here:

[https://www.expotraffic.com/headshots/las-vegas-headshots](https://www.expotraffic.com/headshots/las-vegas-headshots)

**Location**

**East Summerlin near Rainbow & Alta**

**Exact address provided after booking.**

**Looking forward to creating something great together!**

**– Steve Fogarty**

**Owner – STEVEN JOSEPH PHOTOGRAPHY | EXPO TRAFFIC HEADSHOTS**

STOP venligst med at koge kartofler i vand! Da min bedstemor hørte, at jeg koger kartofler i vand for at lave kartoffelmos, grinede hun bogstaveligt talt af mig. Hun delte den hemmelige ingrediens til at lave den bedste kartoffelmos nogensinde. Brug denne ingrediens i stedet – jeg lægger opskriften nedenunder. .
Jeg må udtrykke noget for at blive ved med at få mine opskrifter.... Tak. Fuld opskrift

items.text:
NYE STATISTROLLER TIL OPTAGELSER I JYLLAND PÅ TV-SERIEN DE BEDSTE FAMILIER (DR)

Til tv-serien De Bedste Familier (til DR) søges personer i Jylland alder 20-50 år til statistroller med optagelse i Jylland, men med kostume/sminke dag i Skovlunde på Sjælland d. 3/3, 4/3 eller 5/3 et tidsrum ml. 10-16.

Produktionen dækker transport på en af disse måder:
1. Bro og benzin fra bopæl i Jylland til Skovlunde og retur. Alternativt en lavpris færgeovergang t/r tilsvarende prisen for broafgift.
2. En lavpris bus- eller togbillet. Der kører offentlige bus fra Skovlunde st. til adressen i Mileparken.

Derudover er der et personligt honorar for kostume/sminkedagen samt et tilpasset antal optagedage. Se nedenfor

Følgende statistroller er ledige:
Funktionærer og hustruer 
Du skal kunne være med til begge optagelsesdagene
16/3 ca. 15 - 02.30 og igen 17/3 ca. kl. 11 - 22.30 i Handest Jylland

Der er til hver 1600 kr. honorar for 2 optagedage og 800 kr. honorar for 1 sminke/kostumedag.

Der er mulighed for gratis anvist parkering i Skovlunde til kostume/sminkeprøve.
Der er forplejning tilpasset tidsrum på optagelsesdage.
Udgifter til f.eks. transport dækkes ikke på optagelsesdage.

Følgende krav til krop og udseende pga. tilgængelige kostumer og tidsperioden:

NB! Danmark var ikke så beriget med forskellige nationaliteter, så du skal ligne en med dansk/nordeuropæisk herkomst.

MÆND:
max højde 185, tøjstr. S-L (der er ingen kostume i XL eller over), ingen synlige tatoveringer med skjorte på eller piercinger, hårfarve skal være naturlig og ensfarvet med mindre gråt, hårlængde min. 5 cm så der kan laves sideskilning, ingen kronraget eller karseklippet, ingen skæg, du skal kunne se uden briller.

KVINDER:

max højde 175, str. XS-L, korthåret, min. hårlængde til skulder, naturlig hårfarve, ingen striber med mindre det er gråt hår, ingen synlige tatoveringer med korte ærme og kjole med udskæring på, ingen synlige piercinger, ingen synlig falske negle eller øjenvipper, ingen tatoveret eyeliner eller øjenbryn, du skal kunne have selskabssko på, du skal kunne se uden briller.

Vi skal kende følgende for at komme i betragtning, som skal sendes i en mail til ajlystbaek@hotmail.com

Navn, alder, mobilnummer, højde, tøjstr., skostr., mål: hoved-hals-bryst-talje-hofte og inseam/outseam.

Der skal være to helt nye billeder: vellignende billede i helfigur samt et selfie, hvor hår og ansigt ses tydeligt.

Oplys, hvilken mulighed du har for at komme over til kostume/sminkeprøven og forventet pris.

items.text:
ATTENTION: 🎬 CASTING CALL: FEARLESS & FABULOUS 🔥

ARE YOU ADVENTUROUS?
ARE YOU A THRILL SEEKER?
Or JUST DOWN FOR TRYING SOMETHING NEW?

Are you a woman who’s ready to trade in the ordinary for the extraordinary?

SixNetics LLC and FWD TV Network are casting bold, confident, and dynamic women for a brand-new reality series that transforms everyday routines — and even full-on “diva” lifestyles — into heart-racing, adrenaline-pumping adventures.

This show is about stepping outside your comfort zone and into the thrill of a lifetime.

💄 Are You…

Living a glamorous, high-maintenance, or routine-driven lifestyle?

Known for your confidence, style, and strong personality?

Ready to swap brunches and beauty appointments for skydives and survival challenges?

Curious to discover how fearless you really are?

💥 On This Show You’ll Experience:

Extreme outdoor adventures

High-intensity physical challenges

Fun, and intense experiences

Adrenaline sports

Personal growth moments that push you beyond your limits

We’re looking for women (21+) with BIG personalities, open minds, and the courage to try something completely new. No prior athletic experience required — just a willingness to embrace the unexpected.

This is more than a reality show — it’s a transformation.

From “diva” to daring. From routine to rush. From comfort to conquer.

📍 Filming location: TBD
📅 Production dates: TBD

To Apply:
Send your name, age, city, recent photos, and social media handles to:

Sixneticsinc@gmail.com with Thrill Seeker in the subject.

Are you ready to prove that glam can be gutsy?

Apply now. 💋🔥

items.text: Casting Families for Academy Commercial!

sharedPost.text:
Vicky Boone Casting is looking for real, outdoors-loving families for BACKGROUND roles in an Academy Sports commercial. 

Project: Academy Sports + Outdoors
Agency: McGarrah Jessee
Production Company: The Bear
Project Type: Social Media Campaign 
Union Status: Non-Union
Project Rate: $250/day per family member
Fitting Rate: $50/hour (if applicable)
Shoot Date(s): March 26 - March 30, 2026 (will likely shoot 1-2 day within this range)
Shoot Location: Austin, TX (and surrounding area). Must work local to Austin.
Term: 3 months from first use date for video and perpetual for stills

—

We are looking for:
[REAL FAMILIES], all ethnicities, who love the outdoors. Children 4–16; parents 25–50. Families should be comfortable swimming. Families comfortable on bikes or scooters are also encouraged to submit.

If your family might be a fit and is interested in submitting, please submit ASAP to submissions@vickyboonecasting.com by sending the following info:

*Name
*City you live in
*Contact Number
*Two recent photos of your family
*Confirm you are avail for all the dates mentioned or list conflicts (3/26 - 3/30)
*Please indicate if you/your family are comfortable swimming/being in a swimsuit.
*Please indicate if dad has golf, hunting or fishing experience
*Please indicate if comfortable with bikes/scooters 
*Please use the subject line “REAL SUMMER FAMILY” 

Use: Video usage covers use in social media for 3 months from first air date, includes unlimited edits, lifts, and versions now known or hereafter developed. Usage also covers use of stills for use in: all digital media (including but not limited to: websites, emails, paid/organic social, banners, etc.), in-stores, collateral material, and OOH. Still usage is perpetual

[We do not give permission to other casting sites to repost this casting call]

We look forward to your submissions!

–Team VBC

items.text:
Hi there 👋🏻😃
I’m Freya Tingley, an Australian actress keen to connect with filmmakers who are developing or heading into production on proof-of-concept shorts, features, or series.

I’m particularly interested in collaborating with legitimate, funded projects, or attaching early to strong scripts that are seeking finance.

My work includes Netflix’s Hemlock Grove, playing Wendy Darling on Once Upon a Time, working with Clint Eastwood on Jersey Boys, voicing a lead role in Netflix’s DOTA, and leading six feature films including the horror titles The Sonata and Time Addicts (currently streaming on Netflix).

I can work in the US, UK, and Australia, and I’m currently based in Australia.

My showreel is available on IMDb:

imdb.me/freyatingley

If you have a project in mind — I’d love to connect!

Freya

I’m looking for 3 actors for a short film about free will. This is a quick interview style shoot. About 30 minutes per actor.
Roles
1 female, white, 30s
1 male, Latinx, 40s
1 male, white, 40s
You will need to memorize about one page of script. It will be shot as an on camera interview.
If you are interested, DM me your headshot and a reel link if you have one, plus your availability.

items.text:
Szukasz auta, które zrobi klimat w pierwszym kadrze?

Nie kolejny zwykły samochód.
Prawdziwy, amerykański charakter.

🔥 Ford Mustang 3.7 V6 | 2016 | Manual
🎬 dostępny do: teledysków, filmów, reklam, rolek, sesji zdjęciowych i eventów

To auto:
✔ wygląda agresywnie nawet stojąc
✔ brzmi rasowo i głośno (idealne pod nagrania)
✔ świetnie wychodzi w dynamicznych przejazdach
✔ ma zadbane, fotogeniczne wnętrze

📍 Warszawa / Mazowieckie (możliwy dojazd gdzieś dalej)
🚘 Wynajem wyłącznie z kierowcą jako opiekun pojazdu 
📅 Dostępność 7 dni w tygodniu

💰 400 zł / godz.
Cena za cały dzień /wycena indywidualna 

Jeśli chcesz, żeby Twoja produkcja wyglądała drożej niż budżet – Mustang robi robotę.

📩 Napisz priv z terminem i lokalizacją – podeślę zdjęcia / video i ustalimy szczegóły.

items.groupTitle: PRACA w produkcji filmowej - Statyści, Aktorzy, Epizodyści, Castingi, TFP
items.summary:
Szukasz auta, które zrobi klimat w pierwszym kadrze?

Nie kolejny zwykły samochód.
Prawdziwy, amerykański charakter.

🔥 Ford Mustang 3.7 V6 | 2016 | Manual
🎬 dostępny do: teledysków, filmów, reklam, rolek, sesji zdjęciowych i eventów

To auto:
✔ wygląda agresywnie nawet stojąc
✔ brzmi rasowo i głośno (idealne pod nagrania)
✔ świetnie wychodzi w dynamicznych przejazdach
✔ ma zadbane, fotogeniczne wnętrze

📍 Warszawa / Mazowieckie (możliwy dojazd gdzieś dalej)
🚘 Wynajem wyłącznie z kierowcą jako opiekun pojazdu 
📅 Dostępność 7 dni w tygodniu

💰 400 zł / godz.
Cena za cały dzień /wycena indywidualna 

Jeśli chcesz, żeby Twoja produkcja wyglądała drożej niż budżet – Mustang robi robotę.

📩 Napisz priv z terminem i lokalizacją – podeślę zdjęcia / video i ustalimy szczegóły.

Warszawo! 😊
na 25.02 (środa) szukamy PILOTA SAMOLOTU- STATYSTA 
25-38 lat. 
Chętni i dyspozycyjni proszę o zgłoszenie na maila:  

casting@entris-art.pl
sharon@entris-art.pl

w tytule - pilot
zgłoszenie musi zawierać:
* imię i nazwisko
* wiek
* numer telefonu
* zdjęcia( twarzy i sylwetki) 
zgłoszenia będą brane pod uwagę tylko z kompletem informacji☺️
Stawka 130 zł płatne po planie.

Czekamy na zgłoszenia do jutra do 12.00!
ENTRIS TEAM

items.text:
WARSZAWA 23.02.2026r. 

Szukam studentów aktorstwa lub epizodystów w wieku 20+, którzy wzięliby udział w spocie internetowym. 

Przewidujemy, że zdjęcia będą trwały około 4h, w godzinach 12-16. 

STAWKA 300 zł 

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na maila: julia@podtytulem.pl
W tytule maila: NIL 23.02
W treści maila poproszę o wizytówkę, dane kontaktowe, zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki oraz ewentualną wiadomość o posiadanym doświadczeniu czy ukończonej szkole aktorskiej. 

Widzimy się na planie!

sharedPost.text:
NOWY PROJEKT - SZUKAMY DUBLERA AKTORA na 50 dni zdjęciowych!!!
Stawka za każdy dzień 250 zł 

Wymagane wymiary (mogą być minimalnie większe)

wzrost 181cm 
Klatka 113 cm
Pas 98 cm
Szyja 40 cm
barki 42cm
Głowa obwód 59 cm 
But 44 
-BRODA 
- wiek 40- 55 lat

Dodatkowe umiejętności / cechy szczególne:
- prawo jazdy kat. B, komfort za kierownicą
- sprawność fizyczna
- umiejętność pływania 

terminy:

okres zdjęciowy: 15.04 - 05.08

przerwa w zdjęciach: 26.06 - 22.07

Zgłoszenie musi zawierać:

- imię i nazwisko 
- wiek
- nr telefonu do kontaktu 
- dobrej jakości aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki (bez okularów, nakryć głowy, itp.)
- warto napisać kilka słów o sobie i dołączyć wizytówkę

items.text:
Casting call!!!
Short film

Passion project, (unpaid) but percentage of any profits will be agreed.

Festival submissions

Filmed in Lytham, Lancashire. 

Logline

A troubled man returns to the seaside town where a tragedy destroyed more than just his life, confronting a figure from his past in a haunting search for forgiveness and closure and the biggest question, is Redemption always attainable, or is something you have to live without. 

Just One More is a gritty, character-driven short film set on the Lytham seafront. The story follows Shawn, a man burdened by guilt and regret, as he meets Rob, someone from his past connected to a tragic event that changed both their lives. Through intense dialogue and fragmented memories, the film explores themes of addiction, blame, grief, and redemption, culminating in a powerful psychological twist.

The film has a gritty, realistic tone with strong emotional performances and a grounded British setting. We are looking for actors who can deliver subtle, naturalistic performances and convey deep internal conflict.

 

Rachel 

Age Range: mid 20s to mid-30s

Gender: Female

Ethnicity: Open

Description:

A silent or minimal-dialogue role representing family and continuity. She appears  with a pram and young child, triggering Rob’s emotional breakdown and symbolising what he lost. She then has a devastating emotional breakdown, will include an action scene as she attacks the lead protagonist.

Performance Notes:

This role relies on subtle presence, naturalism and raw emotion. No heavy dialogue required.

MELISSA

Age Range: Mid–20s to early 30s

Gender: Female

Ethnicity: Open

Accent: Northern / British (flexible depending on casting)

Description:

Melissa is Shawn’s partner and represents the life he could have had. She is warm, playful, and emotionally open, with a natural charm and energy. In the present day, she appears briefly but symbolically, embodying love, hope, and what was lost. In flashbacks, she is caring but frustrated by Shawn’s drinking and reckless behaviour.

I'm aiming to get this short film shot within the next two weeks. It is only approximately 5 minutes long and requires minimal dialogue.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of one or more people

A silent or minimal-dialogue role representing family and continuity. She appears  with a pram and young child, triggering Rob’s emotional breakdown and symbolising what he lost. She then has a devastating emotional breakdown, will include an action scene as she attacks the lead protagonist.

Performance Notes:

This role relies on subtle presence, naturalism and raw emotion. No heavy dialogue required.

MELISSA

Age Range: Mid–20s to early 30s

Gender: Female

Ethnicity: Open

Accent: Northern / British (flexible depending on casting)

Description:

Melissa is Shawn’s partner and represents the life he could have had. She is warm, playful, and emotionally open, with a natural charm and energy. In the present day, she appears briefly but symbolically, embodying love, hope, and what was lost. In flashbacks, she is caring but frustrated by Shawn’s drinking and reckless behaviour.

I'm aiming to get this short film shot within the next two weeks. It is only approximately 5 minutes long and requires minimal dialogue.

Hey zusammen, 

Ich suche für eine kleine YouTube Serie eine Darstellerin die eine Influencerin spielt. Das Team ist klein also eigentlich nur ich 😂. Bei Interesse gerne melden und weitere Infos bekommst du dann per privater Nachricht. 

Spielalter ca. 20-23 Jahre. Solltest du älter sein aber "jünger" aussehen sollte das kein Problem sein. 

Gage stand jetzt Keine ( sorry) 

Das gesamte materiale kannst du gerne benutzen. Für Verpflegung ist gesorgt.

Drehstart ca. Mai/Juni

Viele Grüsse 
Daniel

items.text:
CASTING CALL- LOS ANGELES PLAY

Hey y’all!! My 10 minute play got into a play festival called Script Shuffle 2026 and we’re looking to cast someone in the LA area!! 

All we need is a masculine presenting person (any gender) who looks younger to play Child, a 10 year old version of an adult who child is having a conversation with. 

The play is a conversation between an adult and his child self as they share memories and offer advice about life and growing up!

The mandatory dates are tech on Tuesday the 7th and the performances are April 8th and April 10th!

If you or if you know someone who might be interested, please email joshuamedinaentertainment@gmail.com with your headshot & resume for sides!!

items.text:
**🎬CASTING CALL: “Let’s Talk Medicare” Educational Video Series**

**Production Company:** Playfish Media
**Client:** UCLA Health Medicare Advantage Plan (UHMAP)
**Role:** On Camera Host / Medicare Advocate
**Union Status:** Non-union
**Shoot Duration:** One full-day
**Shoot Dates:** April 1, 2, or 3, (exact date TBD)
**Filming Location:** Seattle, WA
**Usage Term:** 3 years, regional to Los Angeles County

[Playfish Media](http://playfishmedia.com/) is seeking a warm, relatable on camera host for a five part educational video series for UCLA Health Medicare Advantage Plan. Each video will run approximately two minutes and will also be edited into shorter :30 and :15 cutdowns for use across multiple digital platforms.

**PROJECT OVERVIEW**

“Let’s Talk Medicare” is designed to provide clear, accessible guidance on important Medicare topics. The host will speak directly to camera, helping simplify complex information and build trust with viewers seeking straightforward answers about their healthcare options.

**SEEKING**

Female talent, ages 50 to 65. Hispanic, or Hispanic presenting. Talent should appear healthy, warm, trustworthy, and confident, with a natural and conversational delivery style. We are looking for someone who feels like a knowledgeable, relatable guide, like a friend offering helpful advice, without coming across as overly scripted or sales driven.

Strong direct to camera skills are required. Must be comfortable using a teleprompter and able to deliver scripted material clearly in easily understandable English.

**TRAVEL**

Filming will take place in Seattle, WA. Local talent is encouraged to submit, but nationwide casting is open. Travel and accommodations will be provided if needed.

**USAGE**

Content will run for three years, regional to Los Angeles County. Distribution includes digital and online platforms such as Facebook, Instagram, Nextdoor, paid social advertising, online video and connected TV, website landing pages, and internal training use.

**DISCLOSURE REQUIREMENT**

Talent must disclose any previous representation, endorsement, or appearance in advertising for Medicare related brands, including but not limited to Kaiser, UnitedHealthcare, or SCAN, at the time of submission.

**RATE**

$1,000 shoot day
$3,750 usage
+ Agency fees (if applicable)

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS**

Please submit a self taped audition using the provided script sample, along with headshot and resume.

**Subject line: **“Let’s Talk Medicare”
**Email:** talent@playfishmedia.com
**Submission deadline:** March 3rd

**SCRIPT SAMPLE**

*“Hi there! If you’re new to Medicare, UCLA Health Medicare*

*Advantage Plan is here to help you get started.*

*It’s important to understand Medicare eligibility requirements.*

*Most people become eligible for Medicare when they turn 65.*

*People under 65, with a qualifying disability, may also be eligible.”*

items.text: This is my son Tra he's 14 y/o, from Dallas Texas. We just moved to ATL to help followe his dreams by being an actor. We don't know anyone here yet and looking to start networking. If you guys could help by pointing me to the right direction I'll greatly appreciate it.

items.text:
Your weekly international comedy meetup in the heart of Warsaw ❣️🤍
Live comedy. Real presence. Shared space.

We host a weekly English-language comedy night where people come together to laugh, listen, and connect in the same room.

Stand-up, improv, and occasional surprises, always live, always shaped by the people who show up.

It’s not about being the biggest or loudest show in town.
It’s about creating a space where comedy feels human again.
Each night is a little different.
Some shows lean more toward stand-up, others toward improv or playful experimentation. Sometimes something unexpected sneaks in. Nothing is repeated exactly the same way twice.

You’ll see a mix of bold local and international comedians, first-timers taking their first five minutes on stage, and more experienced performers trying new material in front of a real audience.

We’re not chasing trends.
We’re simply building something consistent, welcoming, and alive.
Hosted by Miguel Ferreira
A Brazilian comedian based in Warsaw, curious about people, culture, and what happens when strangers laugh together.

Why this exists
Because people miss being in rooms.
Because shared laughter still works.
Because live moments feel different when you’re actually there.
This isn’t background entertainment.
It’s something you’re part of.
Schedule
Happy Hour & Meet & Greet: 7:00 PM
Show starts: 8:00 PM
Location
Południk Zero
Wilcza 25, Warsaw
15 minutes from Pałac Kultury

🎟 Tickets:
https://fienta.com/2-0-comedy-show2-154404

🐾 Well-behaved pets are welcome.
🎤 Thinking about performing?

Each show keeps one spot open for a first-time performer.
Five minutes. One mic. A real audience.
📍 Impact Warsaw
Instagram: @impactwarsaw, @miguelatcomedy
Events: impactwarsaw.com/events
Inner Circle: https://t.me/+xJpuxiG5Au8xMmZk
If you’re curious, you’re welcome.
If you need a break from scrolling, come sit with us.
Just show up and see what happens.

Hi everyone,
I’m a 21-year-old dark skin model currently based in Poland and available nationwide.

Height: 194 cm

Age: 21

Location: Available across all of Poland

I’m open to:

• Fashion/editorial shoots

• Commercial & brand work

• Runway & events

• Creative collaborations

• Paid work & selective TFP

Confident, reliable, and comfortable in front of the camera.

Looking to connect with photographers, designers, brands, and agencies.

Feel free to message me directly for photos, portfolio, or booking enquiries.

items.text:
ISO: Background Performers – March 2 – VOLUNTEER

Hi everyone!

We’re looking for background performers for a short film shooting on March 2nd. You’ll be playing club attendees and bystanders in a nightclub scene.

This is a self-funded passion project, and these are volunteer roles. It’s a great opportunity to gain on-set experience, connect with other creatives, and be part of an indie production. Meals and crafty will be provided.

If you’re available and interested, please DM me with your availability and a recent photo. Feel free to share with anyone who might want to join!

Additional information: 

Director: Brandon James Gilbert

Producer(s): Javier Porragas, Jacob Crawford 

DOP: Max Brey 

This is a Union Project, but your BG work will not be applicable to Union status.

We’re looking for background performers for a short film shooting on March 2nd. You’ll be playing club attendees and bystanders in a nightclub scene.

This is a self-funded passion project, and these are volunteer roles. It’s a great opportunity to gain on-set experience, connect with other creatives, and be part of an indie production. Meals and crafty will be provided.

If you’re available and interested, please DM me with your availability and a recent photo. Feel free to share with anyone who might want to join!

Additional information: 

Director: Brandon James Gilbert

Producer(s): Javier Porragas, Jacob Crawford 

DOP: Max Brey 

This is a Union Project, but your BG work will not be applicable to Union status.
items.title: ISO: Background Performers – March 2 – VOLUNTEER

items.text:
Witam. Widziałam parę postów, ale są dość stare. Wysłaliśmy mailem zgłoszenie do agencji GUDEJKO i otrzymaliśmy odpowiedź że spodobała im się nasza córka i chcą ją przyjąć do swojej agencji.
Mamy dość daleko do Warszawy dlatego chcę się upewnić, że warto jechać. Czy ta agencja jest polecana, czy odpisują tak dla większości dzieci i czy pobierają jakieś opłaty? Oraz jak wygląda dalsza droga po podpisaniu umowy? To nasza pierwsza sprawa i jestem zielona w temacie. 

Dziękuję 🤍🤍🤍

sharedPost.text:
WIOSNA się ZBLIŻA - ŻONKIL SYMBOL ŻYDÓW, TO ROŚLINA BARDZO TRUJĄCA!

                                                                                                                                                   ·
Uwaga❗️Ustawa rzekomo wygaszająca pomoc dla Ukraińców właśnie została podpisana przez Prezydenta.
Oto jakie przywileje w niej zostają:
🔥 800+ dla Ukraińców — zostaje. „Ograniczono” je tak, że wystarczy wracać do Polski co 30 dni i można żądać wyrównania za nieobecność. 300+, „aktywny rodzic”, świadczenia rodzinne — wszystko zostaje.
🔥 Ukraińcy dalej pracują bez zezwolenia na pracę. Muszą tylko powiadomić urząd pracy. To całe „wygaszanie”.
🔥 Ochrona tymczasowa przedłużona do marca 2027. PESEL, mObywatel, karty pobytu, Niebieska Karta UE — pełen pakiet. Brakuje tylko obywatelstwa.
🔥 Polska będzie finansować infrastrukturę telekomunikacyjną (Starlinki) na Ukrainie. Z naszych podatków. Teoretycznie „dla bezpieczeństwa RP” — w praktyce wiemy, jak to działa.
🔥 Bezpłatna opieka zdrowotna dla ukraińskich dzieci i ciężarnych — zostaje. W tym samym czasie w Polsce likwiduje się porodówki.
To nie jest wygaszanie pomocy. To jej betonowanie w prawie.
Udostępnij — niech każdy Polak zobaczy, co podpisał prezydent i co przegłosował Sejm.                                          
 Za-Sardyn De Vitava

items.text:
Hello all! We are a group of CU Denver Student filmmakers shooting a project March 20th-22nd. 

**TITLE:** The Last Supper 

**GENRE:** Psychological Horror 

**LOGLINE:** A young woman's first dinner with her wealthy fiancee's family reveals a disturbing ritual.

**ROLES:**

*Evelyn Hernandez* (20's, Latina, Female): A young Latina woman stepping into her fiancee's world for the first time. Evelyn is confident, strong, kind, intelligent, and deeply in love. Everything a family could possibly ask for...if she fits the mold.

*Andrew O'Neill* (20's, White, Male) Evelyn's charming, pristine fiancee. He knows exactly how to make Evelyn feel safe. Raised in a family that values tradition above all else.

*Nicole O'Neill* (40's-60's, White, Female): The O'Neill family's cold, controlling matriarch. A mother who values tradition, appearances, and 'what's best'.

*Bruce O'Neill *(40s-60s, White, Male): The O'Neill family's smug and detached patriarch.

*Milan Garcia* (20's-40's, Latina, Female): Older Latina woman and maid for the O'Neill family. Doesn't say much, but she is not complacent.

**Director/Writer**: Bella Urrutia 

**Producer**: Christine Galvez 

**Production Type:** Student Film 

**Contact Information**: Please contact by email christinegalve.zfilms@gmail.com

**Run Time:** Short (8-10 minutes)

**Compensation**: Unpaid

**Union Status:** Non-Union 

**Audition Information**: Auditions via self tape only, reviewing and casting will be finalized early March 

**Shooting Schedule:** March 20th-22nd

**Filming Location**: Denver/Wheat Ridge area, some locations subject to change

**If you are interested, please scan the QR code or click the link:**

*Audition Form: *https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeiTpaVjnaciNRaruclFMvJFpIAM4pICGlnKLgbNaeYe9wMNw/viewform?usp=header* *

*Sides:*

https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/181sc9BycsKa9u3_ixd-H6Zj4Ms7e1VlP?usp=sharing 

**Any further inquiries please feel free to email.**

topComments.text:
Night Club Alcatraz . Season 2026 . Informative Chat About Contracts…!

Sara: “Wow… I can’t believe how fast these 4 months went by. Every night has been intense, but now I feel both satisfied and exhausted at the same time.”

Lina: “Yes, it’s been a challenge, but every night I felt exactly what I’m capable of. For me, every night was like seeing my energy and talent being rewarded instantly.”

Sara: “Tell me, did you choose the fixed salary option, or the 50% partnership with the club?”

Lina: “I went with the 50% partnership. There’s no fixed salary, but the more energy I give and the better I perform, the more I earn. On nights when customers tip more, I feel appreciated and motivated.”

Sara: “I’ve had a fixed salary + 3% of customer consumption. I feel financially secure every month, but sometimes I feel like I’m not giving my best.”

Lina: “Exactly, that’s the difference. With the 50% option, you truly feel that every effort has an impact and is rewarded. After the season, you feel a satisfaction that a fixed salary can’t compare to.”

Sara: “It’s clear that talent and skill really shine more with this option.”

Lina: “Yes! And that’s what I’ll remember. Beyond the money, the sense of control and recognition for my effort makes it all worthwhile. Next season, we’ll give our best again!”

📱 Contact for applications or more info:
WhatsApp: +355 68 659 3967

Er ist eine intensive, interaktive Session, in der du konkret an deiner Ausrichtung arbeitest.

Vier Stunden.
Mit Fokus.
Mit Strategie.
Mit Umsetzung.

Wenn du bereit bist, deine Karriere nicht mehr zufällig zu betreiben, sondern bewusst zu gestalten, dann ist das dein Moment.

items.text:
Casting male dancer for featured role:
Casting for a featured dancer role in upcoming Bollywood movie. (Filming in the UK) 

Artist must be of Indian or Pakistani descent, must have a British passport. 

Must be Between 13 and 15-year-old or have a look that suits this age group. 

Production dates: May - June. Artist will be needed for multiple dates across this period. This will be disclosed later directly between the production company and artist. 

Shoot location Birmingham; All accommodation, Travel, meals etc will be  provided by production, during the filming schedule. 

Must be strong dancer with the ability to act realistically and contidently.

Artist must speak fluent English, speaking Hindi is bonus but not a requirement for this character.

Previous camera experience is not required but is a bonus so please mention this when submitting.

Apply today via email with Showreel,

Photos and CV

SAHANAENTERTAINMENT@OUTLOOK.COM

Please do jot apply via messages as these will not be scene.

items.text:
CASTING CALL – VOICE OVER ARTIST (MALE, US ACCENT)

We are seeking a male voice artist with an authentic American accent for a powerful and sensitive documentary exploring domestic violence, produced in collaboration with The Purple Project.

The role involves reading a series of poems written by survivors. The performance requires emotional intelligence, and the ability to deliver deeply personal material with authenticity and respect.

Details:

Male voice, natural US accent

Recording in London

Less than half a day’s work

Unpaid (charity collaboration)

This is an opportunity to contribute to an important project amplifying survivor voices and supporting meaningful change.

If interested, please get in touch.

items.text:
CASTING / BACKGROUND ACTORS CALL 

25/02/25

The Party No One Wanted (Short Film)

**A dark comedy about grief and family relationships.**

Robbie and Mary have to get through an excruciating memorial that has a DJ, karaoke and a pregnancy announcement / gender reveal planned by their half sister Lisa. Please email if you would like to read the script :)

Email: [mhmollie0303@icloud.com](mailto:mhmollie0303@icloud.com) 

* **Shooting 6th - 9th March in TW196AU 7:30 approx. call time**
* **Travel Expenses Paid**
* Student film hoping to go to Film festivals
* Holding online auditions 
* **Steve** (57-70yrs) Southern English Accent
   * Mary, Robbie and Lisa’s dad doesn’t get involved in the arguing he’s still devastated by the loss of his wife but insists he’s fine
   * Need to be available 6th, 8th & 9th March.
* **Lisa** (35-47yrs) Southern English Accent
   * Self centred and definitely doesn’t know whats appropriate at a memorial. 
   * Need to be available 6th, 7th & 9th March
* **DJ **(45+)
   * Treating the memorial as if its a set at a pub
   * Need to be available 6th & 9th March
* **Peter **(40+) 
   * The pub drunk who didnt even know there was a memorial
   * Need to be available 6th & 9th March
* **Keith **(40+) 
   * Friend of Steve who is quiet and wants to offer his support
   * Need to be available 6th & 9th March
* **James **(30+)
   * Lisa’s boyfriend who is blissfully unaware of all the family tension
   * Need to be available 6th, 7th & 9th March
* **Extras - Any experience welcome!**

**Character Bios (Lisa and Steve): **[https://docs.google.com/document/d/1ipHj1IfKbJSUPp5iRRgmOc37l-Y1RZsP-QQfkD3fyGY/edit?usp=sharing](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1ipHj1IfKbJSUPp5iRRgmOc37l-Y1RZsP-QQfkD3fyGY/edit?usp=sharing)** **

**Director’s Statement: **[https://docs.google.com/document/d/1j7Tns7vph04wJiUQMCFhf1RKu4n00us00ARUfFXqBdI/edit?usp=sharing](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1j7Tns7vph04wJiUQMCFhf1RKu4n00us00ARUfFXqBdI/edit?usp=sharing)

items.text:
*HASTER*

Vi har fået nogle afbud til optagelser i morgen, og vil derfor høre om der er nogen der har lyst til at være med på optagelser i morgen i KBH K.

Vi skal lave en brandfilm for dansk fodboldklub.

Optagelserne finder sted mellem kl. 11.30 og 16.00 i København K.

Man skal være over 21 år. 

Jobbet er lønnet med 500 DKK. 

Send gerne en mail med billede, alder og telefon nummer, hvis der interesseret - så vender jeg tilbage hvis det bliver aktuelt :) 

statist@baconcph.com

De bedste hilsner,
Nana

Casting This Sunday (28th) – Paid UGC / Reel Content – Baby Brand
Looking for a female actor (ages 26–35) for a paid content shoot this Sunday the 28th.

This is for a baby brand and will be filmed in a UGC / content creator style (natural, conversational, authentic delivery — not commercial or theatrical).

Must be:

 • Comfortable speaking directly to camera

 • Able to deliver lines naturally like a content creator

 • Quick at memorizing scripts

 • Confident filming short-form Reels / TikTok-style content

This is paid content creation work (UGC), + a traditional film production setup.

If you’re available this Sunday the 28th, text 858-753-5927 with:

 • Your name

 • Age

 • Headshot

 • Any relevant UGC / Reel examples

Serious inquiries only.

items.text: "Jeg fik endelig denne opskrift fra min mor sidste jul og lavede tre portioner af den! Jeg elskede den altid som barn, og ingen kan holde fingrene fra den. Jeg havde altid antaget, at tante Bill var en fjern slægtning, så jeg blev overrasket over at opdage, at dette ikke var en familieopskrift, men en ret berømt en, haha!" Jeg poster ofte opskrifter. Gå ikke glip af den næste!

**Location:** The Bearded Monk, 122 E McKinney St, Denton, TX 76201

**Date:** Sunday, March 1st
 **Time:** 10pm – 6am

**Wardrobe:** Casual
* **No copyright logos**
* Please wear **gray, black, white, or brown** attire

items.text:
CASTING CALL 🎬
We are 5th year MA students from University of Asia and the Pacific, and we are inviting you to be part of our 15 Min Short Film!

Handa ka na bang maging bahagi ng isang kuwentong puno ng alaala at muling pagkikita? 🎥

🗓 Application Period: February 20–25�

📧 Send applications to: primaproductions8@gmail.com�

✉️ Subject line format: CHARACTER – YOUR NAME�Ex: ALBA – MARIA AQUINO

🎬 Final shooting dates: 3rd week of March

📌 Kindly check our pubmats for more details�

⚠️ NOTE: This short film is a student-led project, PURELY FOR ACADEMIC PURPOSES

 LOGLINE: 

After the passing of his separated wife, an estranged father reconnects with his daughter after nearly a decade. The two live in different worlds, the daughter works in corporate, making a name for herself in her industry while the father is near rock bottom. In a desperate attempt to feel closer to her, the father recreates meals that the late mother has made in the past. Each meal recalling a simpler time, with tastes and flavors the daughter had nearly forgotten, slowly reconnecting her to her childhood.

Prima Productions is looking for actors who can portray:

🎭 ARTURO (Father, late 40s)�• Height: 5’6–5’10�• Preferably moreno (open to all complexions)�• Can speak Tagalog (English is a plus)�• Musically gifted is a plus (singing or playing instruments such as guitar or piano)�

Character: A broken yet hopeful father trying to reconnect with his daughter through food, memories, and music.

🎭 ALBA (Daughter, mid-20s)�• Height: 5’3–5’6�• Preferably morena (open to all complexions)�• Can speak both Tagalog and English�

Character: A driven corporate professional carrying emotional distance from her past, slowly rediscovering warmth and nostalgia.

sharedPost.text:
Casting : "Maybe its love, maybe not"

I am Thomas Goersch from Stuttgart Germany. 
Actor and Filmdirector. 
I am making Independent Movies.
I present my movies on International Film festivals and was lucky to receive some awards. 
But the work is not about awards and money, its about making movies for the people to think about.
My next movie is a modern love story:
An elderly man is meeting another younger, very attractive man in the Internet.  But they are from different Continents. They start a long distance relastionship ship. which is full of passion and desire. 
One day the younger man starts to ask for money, cause he is a Student and no more able to pay his bills. 
The older man is full of distrust.
Is he only there  to pay his lovers bills or is there love between them ?
A story with two endings.
One with true love and one with only cheating. Based on a real story.
I am looking for the young attraktive Lover.
Men  25 to 36 years old,  good looking  who is able to film his parts on his own by smartshone
I am always open and honest. You can earn no money on this. but maybe there is a good film in the end promoting for you.
I guess its not necessary that an educated actor is playing this part. so feel free to get in touch
Thats me 
www.imdb.com/name/nm1591928
Get in touch under Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 
please ask for details.
